# AGENTS Index

This file lists local agent configurations for the repository.

 - `bdd-playwright-agent` — Agente para ejecutar y mantener tests Playwright BDD (POM, TypeScript, CLI).

Add new agents by creating a folder or files following the pattern:
- `<name>.agent.md` — metadata and configuration
- `<name>.instructions.md` — task-specific instructions
- `<name>.prompt.md` — the prompt template

Follow repository standards and do not commit secrets into these files.
